scripts.dev: trap 'echo; echo === System terminated. Press ENTER to exit ===; trap - EXIT INT TERM; stty sane < /dev/tty 2>/dev/null' EXIT INT TERM; concurrently -k ".venv/bin/python app.py" "node -e \"(function check() { const s = require('net').connect(8000, '127.0.0.1', () => { s.end(); process.exit(0); }).on('error', () => setTimeout(check, 100)); })()\" && vite < /dev/null"
